component_energy_claim.name: REDUCED_COMPONENT_ENERGY_PER_USEFUL_WORK
requires: stable GPU and/or CPU package power telemetry

whole_system_energy_claim.name: REDUCED_WALL_ENERGY_PER_USEFUL_WORK
whole_system_energy_claim.note: GPU/CPU component power is not wall power.

thermal_claim.name: REDUCED_THERMAL_STRESS
requires: matched ambient conditions or explicit limitation

forbidden_inference: lower instantaneous temperature automatically proves longer life
component power automatically equals wall energy
lower power automatically proves more valid proofs per joule
fewer completed batches automatically means less useful work
a working gate proves mining profitability
